prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 湖南师范大学医学类在江苏省 2021-2025 年最低录取位次分别为：2021 年 25631 名（计划 15 人）、2022 年 29714 名（计划 5 人）、2023 年 34853 名（计划 15 人）、2024 年 31527 名（计划 19 人）、2025 年 78396 名（计划 19 人）。2021-2024 年位次基本在 25000-35000 区间波动，但 2025 年位次出现异常跳升，达到 78396 名，远超往年水平。2026 年医学类招生计划为 17 人，较 2025 年的 19 人减少 2 人，缩招约 10.5%，对位次有一定向上支撑作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 湖南师范大学是国家 211 工程重点建设高校和双一流建设高校，位于湖南省长沙市，是一所以师范教育为特色的综合性大学。学校医学部（咸嘉湖校区）开设临床医学、药学、预防医学、医学检验技术等 专业，在师范类院校中医学实力具有一定特色，但整体医学声誉不及传统医科大学。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来报考热度持续较高，临床医学尤其受到考生青睐。但湖南师范大学地处湖南长沙，对于江苏省考生而言属于跨省就读，地域吸引力相对省内高校略弱。2026 年医学类在江苏省仅招 17 人，招生规模较小，位次波动受个别高分考生报考意愿影响较大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合供需弹性模型计算及历年位次趋势分析，2026 年湖南师范大学医学类在江苏省最低录取位次预计为 70445 名左右，波动区间为 69945-70945 名。2025 年位次异常跳升后，2026 年预计有所回落，但缩招因素对位次形成一定支撑，位次不会完全回到 2021-2024 年水平。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Hunan Normal University's medical programs in Jiangsu Province from 2021 to 2025 are: 2021: 25631 (planned 15 students), 2022: 29714 (planned 5 students), 2023: 34853 (planned 15 students), 2024: 31527 (planned 19 students), 2025: 78396 (planned 19 students). From 2021 to 2024, rankings fluctuated within the 25000-35000 range, but in 2025, there was an abnormal jump to 78396, far exceeding previous years. The 2026 medical enrollment plan is 17 students, a decrease of 2 from 2025's 19, a reduction of about 10.5%, which provides some upward support for rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hunan Normal University is a national 211 Project key construction university and a Double First-Class construction university, located in Changsha City, Hunan Province. It is a comprehensive university with a focus on teacher education. The university's medical department (Xianjiahu Campus) offers majors such as Clinical Medicine, Pharmacy, Preventive Medicine, and Medical Laboratory Technology. Its medical strength has certain characteristics among normal universities, but its overall medical reputation is not as strong as traditional medical universities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical majors has remained high, with Clinical Medicine particularly favored by candidates. However, Hunan Normal University is located in Changsha, Hunan, which is an out-of-province option for Jiangsu candidates, making its regional appeal slightly weaker compared to in-province universities. In 2026, only 17 students are enrolled in medical programs in Jiangsu, a small enrollment scale, making ranking fluctuations more susceptible to the application intentions of individual high-scoring candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the supply-demand elasticity model calculation and historical ranking trend analysis, the minimum admission ranking for Hunan Normal University's medical programs in Jiangsu Province in 2026 is expected to be around 70445, with a fluctuation range of 69945-70945. After the abnormal jump in 2025, the ranking is expected to decline somewhat in 2026, but the enrollment reduction factor provides some support, preventing the ranking from fully returning to the 2021-2024 levels.
